description: MCP server configuration. git, memory, and django are free and installable via pip. filesystem and thinking require Node.js/npx.

filesystem.description: Read, search, and list files. Free. Requires Node.js/npx.

git.description: Built-in. Git log, diff, blame, status, branch, show. Zero dependencies.

memory.description: Built-in. Persistent knowledge graph: remember, recall, forget. Zero dependencies.

django.description: Live Django introspection: models, DB schema, URLs, settings, ORM queries, system checks, migrations. Install: pip install django-ai-boost

codebase-memory.description: Persistent code knowledge graph with tree-sitter AST parsing. 158 languages, call chains, architecture overview, change impact. Install: pip install codebase-memory-mcp

thinking.description: Sequential thinking for complex multi-step reasoning. Free. Requires Node.js/npx.
